headline: OpenAI Partners with Accenture, PwC on Codex
summary: OpenAI launched Codex Labs with partnerships including Accenture, PwC, and Infosys to help enterprises deploy AI across software development lifecycles, reaching 4M weekly active users. The consulting partnerships signal how major firms are building AI implementation capabilities as core service offerings.
so_what: OpenAI launched Codex Labs with Accenture, PwC, and Infosys to help enterprises deploy AI across software development. This signals major consulting firms are building AI implementation capabilities as a core service offering.
